event.upcomingDescription: Predictions are open until each fight starts. Crowd percentages are visible, but individual picks stay private.
event.liveDescription: Predictions are locked. All picks are now public.
event.completedDescription: Results are in. Review your picks, scores, and vote for the event MVP.
event.fightListDescription: Break down the fights and make your picks

prediction.notSubmitted: You did not submit a prediction.
prediction.editUntilStart: You can edit your pick until fight start.

auth.signupDescription: Create your account first. Your ring name comes next on the home screen.
auth.loginDescription: Step back into the arena and track your picks.
auth.signupCheckEmail: Check your email to confirm your account. If that address can sign up, a confirmation link will arrive shortly.
auth.invalidCredentials: That email or password doesn't match.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Your email hasn't been confirmed yet.
auth.userExists: That email is already registered. Please log in instead.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.providerUnavailable: That social login isn't available yet. Please try email login for now.
auth.authUnexpected: We couldn't complete authentication right now.
auth.oauthCallbackFailed: We couldn't complete that social login. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSent: Check your email! We sent you a password reset link.
auth.passwordResetLoginPrompt: Password changed. Please log in with your new password.
auth.dashboardGateTitle: Log in to open your dashboard.
auth.dashboardGateDescription: Track your score trend, streaks, badges, and strongest weight classes in one place.
auth.myRecordGateTitle: Log in to open your record.
auth.myRecordGateDescription: Review every pick, event scorecard, and prediction result from one home base.
auth.eventRecordGateTitle: Log in to open this event report.
auth.eventRecordGateDescription: See how you scored on this card, fight by fight.
auth.pickGateTitle: Sign up to lock in your pick.
auth.pickGateDescription: Takes 10 seconds. We'll save your prediction the moment you're in.

account.resetRecordConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset your record? All predictions, scores, and badges will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
account.resetRecordFailed: We couldn't reset your record right now.
account.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? All data will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteAccountFailed: We couldn't delete your account right now.
account.ringNameTaken: This ring name is already taken

home.heroTitle: It's not guessing. It's reading the fight.
home.heroDescription: Predict Black Combat fights, build your record, and prove you're the real fight expert.

rankingPage.title: Fight IQ Rankings
rankingPage.description: A leaderboard of Black Combat fans proven by prediction records

onboarding.title: Choose the ring name you'll carry into this fight against the MMA Fight IQ crowd.
onboarding.description: This is the name that will follow your rankings, streaks, and picks across Black Pick.
onboarding.duplicateHint: If someone already took it, we'll line up a few fight-ready alternatives for you.
onboarding.label: Your ring name
onboarding.helper: 3-20 characters. Letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and underscores only.
onboarding.tooShort: Your ring name needs at least 3 characters.
onboarding.tooLong: Your ring name must stay within 20 characters.
onboarding.invalidCharacters: Use only letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, or underscores.
onboarding.taken: That ring name is already taken.
onboarding.notAuthenticated: Please log in again to finish onboarding.
onboarding.unexpected: We couldn't save your ring name right now.
onboarding.anonCtaTitle: Ready to make your first pick?
onboarding.anonCtaDescription: Sign up to lock in your predictions and climb the rankings.
onboarding.firstPickHintDescription: Tap a fighter to call the winner and earn your first point.

discussion.title: Discussion
discussion.placeholder: Share your thoughts on this fight...
discussion.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first!
discussion.loginRequired: Log in to join the discussion.

share.subtitle: Locked in on Black Pick
share.noFights: No fights on this card yet.
share.noPick: No pick saved for this fight.
share.ctaSubtitle: Tap through to set your predictions for this card.
share.copyFailed: Couldn't copy — long-press to copy manually.
share.ctaAllLocked: All {total} picks ready. Share them with friends.
share.ctaCompleteRecord: {wins}W {losses}L this card. Show it off to friends.
share.ctaCompleteStreak: {streak} in a row. Show your friends.
share.ctaDisabledNoRingName: Set a ring name to share
share.ctaDisabledNoPicks: Save a pick to unlock sharing
share.stickyPrompt: Your picks are ready. Share them with friends.
